backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the dental clinic backend, defining data types and CRUD operations for appointments, reviews, doctors, services, before/after gallery, user profiles, and clinic status, with role-based access control and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping the full dental clinic website restoration feature to its associated frontend/backend files, components, and test IDs with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference for the purpose and key details of every component, page, hook, and context in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point that defines CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes, plus base body and border styles.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to 'XYZ Dental Clinic' and mounting the app via the root div and main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app that configures TanStack Router with lazy-loaded routes for all public and admin pages, wraps the app in QueryClient and ClinicStatusProvider, and guards admin routes via sessionStorage check.
frontend/src/components/AdminGuard.tsx: Simple admin route guard component that checks the sessionStorage 'adminAuthenticated' flag and redirects to home if absent, plus an exported isAdminAuthenticated helper.
frontend/src/components/BackgroundPartic: Stub component that renders nothing, serving as a placeholder for a background particles effect.
frontend/src/components/BeforeAfterSlide: Interactive before/after image comparison slider with drag and touch support, tab selection for three treatment pairs, and an IntersectionObserver-based scale-up entrance animation.
frontend/src/components/BookAppointmentD: A modal dialog component for booking dental appointments that collects patient name, contact info, preferred date, and service type, then submits via a mutation hook and shows a success confirmation.
frontend/src/components/ClinicStatusBann: Displays a top banner indicating the clinic is in emergency-only mode or closed, hidden when the clinic is open or loading.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Renders a contact section with animated cards for phone, email, address, and hours, plus a WhatsApp button and an embedded map.
frontend/src/components/CustomCursor.tsx: A stub component that renders nothing, serving as a placeholder for a custom cursor feature.
frontend/src/components/DoctorProfile.ts: Displays the lead dentist's profile with an animated image, bio text, and a grid of credential badges using IntersectionObserver for scroll animations.
frontend/src/components/FloatingDentalEl: A stub component that renders nothing, serving as a placeholder for floating decorative dental elements.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand info, quick navigation links, services list, contact details, and a hidden admin login modal triggered by clicking the logo.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: A fixed navigation header that changes style on scroll, includes desktop and mobile nav links, a phone link, and a Book Appointment button that respects clinic open/closed status.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with animated rotating words, entrance animations, stats bar, and a booking CTA button that respects clinic open/closed status.
frontend/src/components/HiddenAdminLogin: Modal dialog for admin login with hardcoded credentials that sets a sessionStorage flag and redirects to /admin on success.
frontend/src/components/HiddenAdminTrigg: Invisible fixed element in the bottom-right corner that opens the admin login modal when double-clicked within 500ms.
frontend/src/components/LiquidGradientBa: Fixed full-screen decorative background with animated radial gradients rendered behind all page content.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Login/logout button using Internet Identity; handles authentication state and clears the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/MagneticButton.t: Stub wrapper component that renders its children inside a div, with no magnetic behavior implemented.
frontend/src/components/ScrollProgressBa: Stub component that renders nothing (returns null).
frontend/src/components/ServicesGrid.tsx: Animated grid of five dental service cards with scroll-triggered fade-in effects and navigation to individual service routes on click.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialCarou: Auto-scrolling infinite carousel of patient testimonials fetched from the backend, falling back to hardcoded data if none are available.
frontend/src/components/TypewriterText.t: Stub component that renders text as a plain span with no typewriter animation.
frontend/src/components/UserProfileSetup: Modal form shown to newly authenticated users to collect and save their display name via the backend profile mutation.
frontend/src/components/ZoomInImage.tsx: Image component that uses a scroll-reveal hook to animate from scaled-down and invisible to full size when it enters the viewport.
frontend/src/context/ClinicStatusContext: React context that fetches and exposes clinic status (open/closed/emergency) via a provider and hook, using the useGetClinicStatus query.
frontend/src/context/CursorContext.tsx: React context that manages a cursor icon state ('default' or 'dental') with a provider and hook, without hiding the native cursor.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) actors, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGlassmorphismRevea: Hook that uses IntersectionObserver to set a visibility flag when an element scrolls into view, intended for triggering glassmorphism reveal animations.
frontend/src/hooks/useGSAPScrollReveal.t: Collection of scroll-triggered animation hooks (scroll reveal, fade-in, slide-up, scale-in) using IntersectionObserver and CSS transitions instead of GSAP.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom Internet Identity authentication hook and provider that wraps DFINITY's AuthClient to manage login, logout, and identity state with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useLenis.ts: Hook that enables smooth scroll behavior on the document root element and cleans it up on unmount.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralized collection of React Query hooks for all backend operations including clinic status, appointments, and services CRUD via the ICP actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollReveal.ts: Hook that uses IntersectionObserver to toggle a visibility boolean when an element enters the viewport, with configurable threshold and trigger-once behavior.
frontend/src/hooks/useStaggeredTextRevea: Hook that splits text into words and returns per-word inline styles for staggered fade/blur/slide-up reveal animations triggered by IntersectionObserver.
frontend/src/hooks/useTextScramble.ts: Stub hook that returns text immediately without any scramble animation, serving as a no-op placeholder.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing fonts, configuring Tailwind, defining CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, and declaring keyframe animations and utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/AccessDenied.tsx: Simple full-page access denied screen with a message and a button to navigate back to the home page.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Appointments.ts: Admin page that displays all clinic appointments in a filterable table with live polling, allowing admins to update appointment statuses via a dropdown. Redirects unauthenticated users to the home page.
frontend/src/pages/admin/BeforeAfterMana: Admin page for uploading and managing before/after image pairs with drag-and-drop support, a description field, and upload progress tracking. Displays existing pairs and submits new ones to the backend.
Admin page with a form to add patient reviews (name, text, rating) that are submitted in a pending state awaiting approval before public display.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Dashboard.tsx: Main admin dashboard page showing navigation cards to all admin sections and a clinic status control (Open/Closed/Emergency). Includes logout functionality and redirects unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/admin/DoctorScheduler: Admin page for adding new doctors with name and specialty fields, and displaying the existing list of doctors fetched from the backend.
Admin page for moderating pending patient reviews, allowing admins to approve or delete reviews with star-rating display and toast notifications.
Admin page for managing a fixed list of premium dental services, supporting edits to display name, description, and featured photo with upload progress tracking.
Detail page for the Dental Implants service, featuring a hero section with a booking CTA, a benefits grid, and a BookAppointmentDialog.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Main landing page that composes all major sections (hero, services, doctor profile, before/after, testimonials, contact) along with the header and footer.
frontend/src/pages/InvisalignDetail.tsx: Detail page for Invisalign treatment, showing a hero section, before/after slider, benefits list, and a booking dialog pre-selected for Invisalign.
Detail page for Laser Dentistry, featuring a styled hero with a decorative laser beam, a benefits section, and a BookAppointmentDialog.
frontend/src/pages/PediatricDentistryDet: Detail page for Pediatric Dentistry, highlighting child-friendly features in a green-themed hero and feature grid, with a booking dialog.
frontend/src/pages/ServiceDetail.tsx: Generic service detail page that fetches service data by ID via a query hook and renders the service photo, description, and a booking dialog.
frontend/src/pages/SmileMakeoverDetail.t: Detail page for Smile Makeover, combining a purple-themed hero, a before/after slider, an included-treatments grid, and a booking dialog.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom colors (royal-blue, teal), fonts, border radii, and several keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for the XYZ Dental Clinic app, recording the current feature set, schema version, and configuration for the AI build planner.
